description_long: This is a small, vintage-style biplane with a green fuselage and red double wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century aircraft. The airplane features two sets of straight, parallel wings connected by struts and wires, with a wooden two-blade propeller mounted at the nose. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a single seat visible. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both colored red to match the wings. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable, giving the plane a classic taildragger stance.
description: A small, vintage green and red biplane with double wings, an open cockpit, and a wooden propeller. It has fixed landing gear and a classic taildragger design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wooden propeller, open cockpit, and the double red wings with supporting struts and wires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the green fuselage, red wings, and the tail section with its red stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail assembly, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the double wings.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the propeller profile, open cockpit, and the fixed landing gear beneath the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings mounted one above the other, supported by struts and wires, with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, forward-mounted on the fuselage.
